name: --push
-p
options.description: Pushes the current directory onto the stack, then performs goto

name: --pop
-o
options.description: Pops the top directory from the stack, then changes to that directory

name: --list
-l
options.description: Pops the top directory from the stack, then changes to that directory

name: --cleanup
-c
options.description: Cleans up non existent directory aliases

name: --version
-v
options.description: Displays the version of the goto script
